title: Nutricost C8 MCT Oil Powder
body_html:
• If you want a simple way to add medium-chain triglycerides into your diet, this is it.
  • MCT oil powder is a powerful supplement that has many uses, such as: baking, as an alternative to coffee creamer, it is easier to transport powder than liquid for on-the-go nutrition. And you get the benefits of MCT oil without the traditional “run to the bathroom” trips some experience with oil compared to powdered MCT oil.
  • Non-GMO, Gluten Free, Made in a NSF Certified Facility
  • Manufactured in a GMP compliant, FDA registered facility to ensure product quality and integrity.
  • Premium Quality, Non-GMO, Gluten-Free

⚠️ WARNING: Consuming this product can expose you to chemicals including lead, which is known to the State of California to cause birth defects or other reproductive harm. For more information, go to www.P65Warnings.ca.gov/food.
